Localization.Description: Action with a Casa In request

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {object.value} request from host {src.ip} is received as part of request job {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
A {object.value} request from host {src.ip} is executed as part of request job {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
Failed attempt to execute a {object.value} request from host {src.ip} as part of request job {object.id} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
